full_text:
Wu Yi (Ziyuan) 吳壹 (子遠)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Yi (吳壹), styledZiyuan (子遠), was born in Chenliu. Younger sister married Liu Bei, a general of some renown. Wu Yi was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Wu Yi lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
